# Disaster Priority Model Card

## Model Type
RandomForestRegressor (scikit-learn)

## Features
- severity (1-5): Disaster severity rating
- population (integer): Affected population count
- accessibility (1-5): Area accessibility (1=hard to reach, 5=easy)

## Target
priority_score (1-100): Higher = more urgent

## Training Data
**Synthetic** — generated by `backend/data/generate_synthetic_data.py`
Formula: `base = (severity * 20) + (population / 1000) + ((6 - accessibility) * 10) + noise`

## Disclaimer
Trained on synthetic data — not validated against real disaster outcomes.
Distance-to-team feature omitted in Phase 1 (no team location data exists yet).
For demo purposes only.
